# Telemetry state

`TYP-telemetry-state`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| type | draft |

Snapshot of autopilot state returned by TelemetryListener.get_state(). Fields are populated incrementally as MAVLink messages arrive; absent fields are missing from the dict (not None).

**Type kind:** record

| field | type | unit | optional |
|---|---|---|---|
| lat | `float` | — | no |
| lon | `float` | — | no |
| alt | `float` | — | no |
| heading | `float` | — | no |
| airspeed | `float` | — | no |
| groundspeed | `float` | — | no |
| mode | `int` | — | no |
| armed | `bool` | — | no |
